{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211240046D55F3091E6846C55CDB"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7383705094143951678","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"硬是没看懂？？？？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719155696,"group_id":"7301567677527493669","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"闲来一游","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N159T/UJKMlMduDeTA9PSNM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d292ae8e1a5749cda660e5b0cf449dfb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621298&x-signature=Kw8U7WVRBPBB8yT2dExWFwb13Dc%3D","user_id":"23009524648","user_name":"静气平心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"23009524648","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663404412,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7301567677527493669","book_info":{"abstract":"从某女孩一本正经的说“你是一个好人”升级到 女神娇嗔半推半就的说“你这人真坏” 这要有怎样的经历和自我修养？
这是一个坏蛋怎样炼成的故事。
步沉坚持认为，人要自省，不忘前身。
他直执的认为，自己上辈子一定是一个九世恶人，而且死后被人大卸八块了。上辈子那些个埋他的人，注定他要用一辈子还她们的情。
步沉坚持认为，人要有远虑，兼修来生。
为来生能多生养些女儿，所以这辈子一定要多几个爱人，谁让佛说女儿是父亲上辈子的爱人呢？！
自己认为对的事情，就要坚持。
没毛病。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/38aaa1a16a33a3d50e6c93e685dc9905~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"黄花天子","author_id":"","book_id":"7301567677527493669","book_name":"都市妖孽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7301652313360305152","read_count":"18","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"626810"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"279","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/38aaa1a16a33a3d50e6c93e685dc9905~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252004&x-signature=YDnurp%2BVZWQfkfGWREhAg2QeMyQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"169"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211240046D55F3091E6846C55CDB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"2","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2902,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3475,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7301567677527493669","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","
